trivia_bullets.text: First printing, no reprints. Tribal board wipe: choose a creature type; all creatures of that type get -3/-3 until end of turn. Can be deployed asymmetrically if you don't share that type — effectively a one-sided sweeper.

Flavor text: 'The hex swept through the village, its citizens falling one by one.' Unusually spare for a rare; deliberately withholds the witch's name, sustaining ambiguity about the agent despite the art making her clearly visible.
EDHREC rank 21,193. Sleeper in tribal mirrors and hate piece vs. popular types (Elves, Goblins, Dragons). Power is highly meta-dependent — strong in tribal-heavy environments, narrow otherwise.
sources: WebSearch: Witch's Vengeance tribal discussion via medium.com, boardwipe.com

trivia_bullets.text: Artist Titus Lunter. Elevated-witch-over-crowd composition inverts the typical ELD Wilds power dynamic: the persecuted witch figure is here dispensing punishment from above, not hiding in the woods.

related_cards.name: Kindred Dominance
related_cards.note: High-power tribal board wipe; design lineage context

related_cards.name: Tempting Witch
related_cards.note: Set-mate witch figure; same ELD Wilds faction
